detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 兒童美語教學 (Children's English Instruction)	開課班級 : 應英四甲	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 蘇淑品	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
Objectives: This course is an introduction to the theory and practical applications of child-centered learning and child-centered teaching techniques. We will discuss ways to select, adapt, and set up meaningful and communicative language games and songs, in addition to ideas on classroom organization and lesson planning. 


2.教學綱要
Activities: This course will require readings outside the classes. The students are expected to come to class prepared to present the content of the readings. Students will also perform demo teachings throughout this course. 


3.教科書
3	書名 : Children Learning English (TKT考試必備參考)　
出版日期 : 2005年 月 
作者 : Jayne Moon　出版社 : Macmillan Publishers　版本 :  


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluation: Class participation, assignments: 30 % Midterm exam: 35 % Final exam: 35 %  
Attendance: 2 class absences are permitted without penalty but all assignments are required. Make sure you contact another student for notes, assignments, or hand-outs prior to the next class. Being 10-minutes late for class is regarded as an absence. 
Late Assignments: All assignments are due on the dates announced. Assignments turned in after the due dates will NOT be accepted.
